assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Phase 1 includes comprehensive pre-flight checks with gcloud and kubectl commands to verify current versions, node health (kubectl get nodes), and cluster state

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Section 1.2 provides the exact gcloud container get-server-config command to check available 1.33 versions in the Regular channel

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: Section 1.3 provides kubectl commands to check for deprecated API usage via metrics before proceeding with upgrade

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade (--master flag or --cluster-version)
assertions.reason: Section 3.1 provides the exact gcloud container clusters upgrade command with --master and --cluster-version 1.33 flags

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Section 3.2 and 3.3 include monitoring commands and verification steps with expected outputs like 'DONE' status and 1.33.x version

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Phase 4 provides exact gcloud container node-pools upgrade commands for both default-pool and workload-pool, though it uses same-level upgrades (1.33) rather than skip-level

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Sections 4.2 and 4.5 include watch commands and gcloud operations list commands to monitor node pool upgrade progress

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.32→1.33) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: The runbook provides direct 1.32→1.33 upgrade but does not offer skip-level node pool upgrade options or explain this possibility

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Phase 5 includes comprehensive validation commands checking node versions, pod health, deployments, and system components

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: The 'What If Something Goes Wrong?' section provides troubleshooting steps for common issues like stuck upgrades, though it focuses on troubleshooting rather than explicit rollback procedures
